summary: Email verification feature testing completed successfully. All core email verification flows are working correctly including signup, login blocking, email verification, resend functionality, and multi-language support (English/Italian).

minor_issues.issue: Test uses 'to_email' parameter but API expects 'to_iban'
minor_issues.impact: Test failure only - not related to email verification feature
minor_issues.note: This is a test code issue, not an API issue

minor_issues.issue: Rate limiting at 2 requests per second
minor_issues.impact: Some emails may fail during rapid testing
minor_issues.note: Expected behavior for free tier, not a bug

passed_tests: Demo user (customer@demo.com) can login with email_verified=true
Verification email sent via Resend API (confirmed in logs)
Login blocks unverified users with 403 EMAIL_NOT_VERIFIED error
Verify email endpoint accepts valid token from database
Email verification sets email_verified=true in database
Verify email endpoint rejects invalid tokens with 400 error
Resend verification sends new email to unverified users
Resend verification blocks already verified users with 400 error
Email verifications stored in database with 24-hour expiry
Used tokens marked as used=true in database
Audit logs created for email verification events
Customer login, admin login, accounts, KYC, notifications all working
Admin features (users, audit logs, KYC) working
